condition.selected: The total moved to the other side

incorrects.description: Student selected A: focused only on the reversed equation structure

params.description: Unknown box highlights in today's equation.

steps.text: The total did move, but look closer. What's in the box? That's an unknown. And what picture do you see? That's a stack, not a bag. All three things changed.

incorrects.description: Student selected B: focused only on the unknown box

params.description: Equals sign highlights in last time's equation.
Equals sign highlights in today's equation.

steps.text: There is an unknown, but that's not the only change. Notice where the equals sign is. The total is on a different side. And the picture changed from bags to stacks.

condition.selected: The picture uses stacks, not bags

incorrects.description: Student selected C: focused only on the context image change

params.description: Unknown box and equals sign highlight in today's equation.

steps.text: The picture did change from bags to stacks. But look at the equation itself. Where's the total now? And what's in that box? Three things are different today.

incorrects.description: Student answered incorrectly. System models the correct answer.

params.description: Today's equation highlights all three changes: unknown box, reversed structure with total on left, and stacks context image.

steps.text: Let me show you all three changes. Last time, the total was on the right. Today it's on the left. Last time, every number was known. Today there's a box for an unknown. Last time we had bags. Today we have stacks. All of these are different today.
